name: Zombieman

skills.name: Basic
skills.desc: Deals 40% ST damage directly to single target.

skills.name: Great Skills
skills.desc: Marks self, then deals additional Direct Damage to the target's entire row. Also inflicts [Blind] on the target and 1 random enemy (only before Round 7), and the [Blind] target loses 20% PvP damage reduction.

skills.name: Super Great Technique
skills.desc: Additionally buffs all allies (two buff effects). The [Blind] window lasts for Round 7 > Round 8, and the [Blind] target loses PvP damage reduction by 20% > 30%.

skills.name: Passive
skills.desc: When entering battle, gain +20% Health and +60% Crit DMG Reduction, and become immune to [Blind]. At the start of your turn, remove up to 4 debuffs from all allies. From Round 3 onwards, remove [Link] from all enemies. When entering battle, grants allies in the same column one free skill cast.

skills.name: Extremely passive
skills.desc: Crit DMG Reduction 60% > 70%.

skills.name: Passive 5 stars
skills.desc: Crit DMG Reduction 70% > 80%.

skills.name: Passive awakening
skills.desc: When suffering critical damage, activate [Special Regeneration]. ———- [Special Regeneration]: When entering battle, permanently reduce damage taken by 30%. While you have allies, before your next action, heal to full health and continue fighting, increasing your own ST by 30% and Max HP by 30% (stacked), up to 3 activations.

skills.name: Awakening 2
skills.desc: Reduce damage by 30% > 60%. Maximum number of activations 3 > 4. Additionally, when an ally in the same row activates [Revival] while you have [Specialized Regeneration], cast [Challenge] with 120% skill power.

skills.name: Awakening 3
skills.desc: • Restores 150 Energy (when attacking)

effects.desc: 20% off Arena DMG Free, can't use ultimate, can't attack. Maximum 2 layers; Counts as a stun type effect.
The revive/return mechanism is tied to the life of the ally, bringing the unit back into the match.
Attach deployer's life to an ally; cannot be defeated as long as that ally is alive.
Extra attack outside of turn. Disabled by [Lock] and [Blind].
When entering battle, permanently reduces damage; While allies remain, heal to full health and continue fighting a limited number of times.

bio: A new URplus awakening of Zombieman — the “Heavy Vanguard” (重装先锋): an undying Duelist frontline that cleanses crowd-control for the team, blinds and pierces enemy defenses, and revives with stacking ATK/HP. CV: Takahiro Sakurai.

skills.name: Basic
skills.desc: Deals 120% ST to single target.

skills.name: Great Skills
skills.desc: Unleash a 3-hit combo on all enemies, each hit dealing 7000% ST [Specialized Direct ST] (only affected by enhanced ST multipliers). Ignores 45% of [Special Evasion] and [Non-Crit Damage Reduction], pierces [Unyielding] and [Special Indomitable]. The 1st attack has a 150% chance of causing [Disturb] for 3 turns. — [Disturb]: Before any character acts, if the target does not have [Unique Indomitable] or [Extreme Indomitable], deal 4000% [Disturb Damage] based on Rover's ST; disappears after activation, can stack; ignores 100% [DoT DMG Reduction], passes through [Special Evasion] and [Non-Crit Damage Reduction].

skills.name: Super Great Technique
skills.desc: ST per attack 7000% > 9000%. Ignore [Special Evasion] and [Non-Crit Damage Reduction] 45% > 60%. [Confusion Damage] 4000% > 5500%.

skills.name: Passive
skills.desc: When battle begins, gain 60% [Non-Crit Damage Reduction]. All allies receive 70% [True Damage Reduction]. Removes [DoT DMG Bonus Reduction] from all allies for the duration of the match. When [Refight] activates, the power of this unit's Ultimate attack [Gathering Pursuit] increases by 1.1x.

skills.name: Extremely passive
skills.desc: [Non-Crit Damage Reduction] 60% > 70%. [True Damage Reduction] of all allies 70% > 75%. Power of [Gathering Pursuit] when [Recombat] 1.1x > 1.2x.

skills.name: Passive 5 stars
skills.desc: [Non-Crit Damage Reduction] 70% > 80%. [True Damage Reduction] of all allies 75% > 80%. Power of [Gathering Pursuit] when [Recombat] 1.2x > 1.25x.

skills.name: Passive awakening
skills.desc: When entering battle, permanently reduces the number of times the ST bypass effect [Ultimate Unyielding] of all enemies takes effect by 1. Gains 4 layers of [Refight]. — [Rematch]: Permanently reduces damage received by 75% (+2.5% each time you return to battle). When an ally of the same rank (or all allies) is defeated and this unit is defeated, consume 1 layer of [Refight] to return, restore 100% HP, and perform [Gathering Pursuit] on a random target with 120% Ultimate power; Other fallen allies in the same row have a 70% chance of also activating.

skills.name: Awakening 2
skills.desc: Reduces the number of actions of the [Ultimate Indomitable] ST bypass effect of all enemies 1 > 2. Number of [Rematch] classes 4 > 5. Reduces the ST of [Rematch] by 75% > 78% (+2.5% > 2.8% per return). Power [Gathering Pursuit] 120% > 135%. Activation chance of other allies in the same row 70% > 100%.

skills.name: Awakening 3
skills.desc: Additionally, when attacking, self gains +150 Energy.

Massive ST damage type associated with the Disorder debuff, ignores ST Reduction over time and penetrates Specialized Evasion, disappears after activation.
